metadata.description: Rule-based engine for identifying emergency scenarios and triggering localized immediate actions.

immediate_actions: Call 112 (Integrated Emergency Response)
Share Live Location with 3 trusted contacts
Seek a safe/lockable hiding spot
Tamil Nadu: Use Kaval Uthavi 'Shake Trigger' feature
Odisha: Contact nearest PCR Van via 112
Dial 108 for Emergency Ambulance
Apply direct pressure to bleeding wounds
Check airway and pulse
Tamil Nadu: Call 104 for 24/7 Medical Advice
Odisha: Call 102 (Janani Express) for maternal emergencies
Call Women Helpline 181 or 1091
Get to a public area with witnesses
Do not wash or change clothes (preserve evidence)
Request medical examination and 164 statement recording
Call 1930 Cyber Crime Helpline immediately
Block all bank accounts and credit cards
Report incident on cybercrime.gov.in within the Golden Hour
Take screenshots of all chats and transaction IDs
Call 101 for Fire and Rescue
Evacuate via stairs (Do not use elevators)
Odisha: Alert OSDMA for disaster-level incidents
Tamil Nadu: Alert TNSDMA via 1070

Odisha.specific_advice: In coastal areas during cyclone alerts, move to the nearest Multipurpose Cyclone Shelter.

Tamil_Nadu.specific_advice: Use the Kaval Uthavi App for 1-tap SOS connection to the TN Control Room.

escalation_protocol: If police refuse to file FIR, escalate to SP/Commissioner via official email.
If medical help is delayed, contact the District Medical Officer.
